name: pytest-flask
description: Pytest plugin for testing Flask applications with fixtures to access the Flask test client, application context and live server.

seo.title: pytest-flask — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: pytest-flask: Pytest plugin for testing Flask applications with fixtures to access the Flask test client, application context and live server.

when_to_use: Flask test client and application context as fixtures
Live server fixture for integration tests against Flask
Configuration overrides via app fixture in conftest.py
Combine Flask testing with pytest parametrize

pros: Flask test client fixture ready to use
Live server fixture for E2E scenarios
Thin wrapper, stays close to Flask
cons: Flask is declining relative to FastAPI
Mostly convenience over Flask's own test client
review.verdict: Useful sugar for Flask tests, but the value is modest since Flask ships a capable test client already.
review.best_for: Flask applications wanting pytest fixtures over unittest-style harness
review.not_for: FastAPI or Starlette projects where httpx async clients work better
